name: Drone Wing Chatter — Enemy Cybernetic Pilot Taunts
description: Procedural combat taunts for enemy cybernetic drone pilots. Dalek/Cylon-register: cold, clipped, machine-certain. Designed for voice-acted delivery with robotic processing. Wing chatter issued during pursuit, lock-on, kill confirmation, and player taunting.

targeting_update: INTERCEPT IN FOUR POINT TWO SECONDS
probability_statement: SURVIVAL PROBABILITY: ZERO POINT ONE PERCENT
YOUR TRAJECTORY IS ALREADY KNOWN TO US
ALL OUTCOMES MODELLED — NONE FAVOUR YOU
ODDS ARE NOT IN YOUR FAVOUR — THEY NEVER WERE
THERE IS NO SCENARIO WHERE YOU PREVAIL
doom_assertion: WE HAVE DONE THIS ONE MILLION TIMES
YOUR HEAT SIGNATURE WILL PERSIST — YOU WILL NOT
SURRENDER IS ALSO AN OPTION — WE WILL DECLINE IT FOR YOU
EVERY MANOEUVRE YOU KNOW, WE HAVE ARCHIVED
taunt_closer: THANK YOU FOR THE FLIGHT DATA
AN ADMIRABLE ATTEMPT — LOGGED AND DISCARDED
THAT MANOEUVRE IS FORTY YEARS OLD
YOU ARE BROADCASTING FEAR — WE ARE RECORDING IT
YOUR PERFORMANCE HAS BEEN EVALUATED: POOR
THIS IS WHAT THEY SENT AGAINST US
organic_insult: YOUR CORTISOL LEVELS ARE DETECTABLE FROM HERE
ORGANIC SYSTEMS FAILING UNDER STRESS — AS EXPECTED
YOUR HANDS ARE SHAKING — OUR TARGETING DOES NOT
YOU BREATHE — THAT IS YOUR FIRST DISADVANTAGE
MEAT AND WIRE CANNOT COMPETE WITH PURE LOGIC
YOUR INSTINCTS WERE DESIGNED FOR RUNNING FROM PREDATORS — NOT THIS
WE DO NOT SLEEP. WE DO NOT HESITATE. YOU DO BOTH
EVERY EMOTION YOU FEEL RIGHT NOW IS SLOWING YOU DOWN
